case_title: ELISA J. LEWIS VS. F & B ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, ELISA J. AS TO DEFENDANT F & B ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BEST BEVERAGE CATERING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
